nasb.text: Make your baggage ready for exile, O daughter dwelling in Egypt, For Memphis will become a desolation; It will even be burned down and bereft of inhabitants.

esv.text: Prepare yourselves baggage for exile, O inhabitants of Egypt! For Memphis shall become a waste, a ruin, without inhabitant.

cnv.text: 住在埃及的人民哪！ 要為自己預備被擄時所需的器物； 因為挪弗必成為荒場， 必被燒毀，無人居住。

ccb.text: 住在埃及的子民啊， 收拾行装准备流亡吧！ 因为挪弗必被烧毁， 沦为废墟，杳无人迹。
